log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Githyanki — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+1=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Githyanki — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Githyanki — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:16+3=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 5casting_mod force damage. Githyanki — Winged Striker HP: NaN/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Githyanki — Winged Striker.
→ Githyanki — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:3+6=9 vs DC 11] FAIL! 7 radiant damage. HP: NaN/67
